title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・立ちはだかる絶壁

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Nice one, Kitasan Black!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Your guts are your calling card, Kitasan Black!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff... huff!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Thank... Thank yoooou!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black's running is even more powerful
than before, and it's drawing the crowd's eye right
to her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her performance here has become a great
catalyst for pulling in more fans.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You are Kitasan Black's trainer, yes? May I have a
moment?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I wish to speak with her. That is, I wish to speak
with the ace of the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I did it!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huh? Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I apologize for bothering you right after your
race. I only wish for a quick word.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
First, I must commend you for your performance.
Last year, you were only able to break through
the ranks by sheer force of will...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But today, your overall form was flawless. I can
sense limitless potential in you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black. There is no doubt that you are a
superb Umamusume who will come to define a
generation.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: ...O-oh? Thank you, but I'm really not that...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But that is exactly why I feel so frustrated that
Brusquement was unable to race in the Kikuka
Sho last year.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It pains me that she could not partake in the final
race of the Classics. Do you not feel the same?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
What do you say we make up for last year and
finally settle the score, so both of you can move
forward without any lingering regrets?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove... Are... are you asking if I want to run
against Brusquement?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yes! I want to run against her! I felt so conflicted
on the day of the Kikuka Sho last year...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'd love to wrap up the unfinished business we left
behind, and face off with Brusquement with all
the feelings we've been holding on to!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Good... I'm glad to hear that. Brusquement is of
the same mind. Since you are both in agreement,
we will do our best to make that happen.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me for the intrusion. Until next we meet...
at Nigawa.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Nigawa? Um, Trainer? Why did she bring up
Nigawa?
choice_data_list: Nigawa... That's where Hanshin Racecourse is.
Nigawa... That's where Hanshin Racecourse is.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hanshin... Oh! She must be talking about the
Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The stage for their showdown is set.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
You know, Trainer, I thought today's race was
going to be the biggest mountain I'd have to
conquer this spring...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But it turns out an even bigger one awaits! Next
up, it'll be me and Brusquement at the
Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fire's pumping in our veins. After half a year, our
forgotten final battle is once again back on the
table.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Satono Diamond also finds herself
facing her biggest spring trial.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond falls short in the Japanese
Derby! She was close, but unfortunately, she
came in second!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And her loss was by a mere eight centimeters!
That's right, it was just eight centimeters! She
really almost had it, folks!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
My cleat... Of all the times I could've had a cleat
malfunction, why here at such an important race?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I already lost at the Satsuki Sho, and now I've lost
the Derby... But I can't lose. I can't, Kita.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'll break this jinx if it's the last thing I do. Even if
it means I have to put my life on the line.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Those last eight centimeters are because of my
weakness!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: ...Dia!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black isn't the only one who's growing.
Satono Diamond is as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The hopes of her family rest heavily on Satono
Diamond's shoulders, but she looks on, her regal
expression fierce with determination.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to get my cleats refitted in preparation
for fall. There must be more I can do to reduce
the possibility of another accident.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to be more diligent about checking in
with my own health and body. But most
importantly...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I need the strength to win, fully cleated or not. I
need to be strong enough to stand firm and
dispel that curse!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
That's the spirit, Dia! I'm facing a wall that's just
as insurmountable.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to have to run against a prodigy
Umamusume, but I'm not going to lose!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
You'd better watch me as I take on the
Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I will!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Massive walls loom before the both of them,
barring their paths. Kitasan Black will go first in
confronting her obstacle—the Takarazuka Kinen.
